# Reedly

> Reedly is an AI agent that transforms B2B field sales meetings into structured reports in under 2 minutes. The mobile app (iOS & Android) records the meeting, transcribes audio with 95%+ accuracy, then automatically generates a report in 11 sections: executive summary, client profile, expressed needs, objections & responses, products discussed, competitors mentioned, mutual commitments, next steps, opportunities, risks, and strategic recommendations. Audio is deleted after generation (privacy by design).

## Pages

### Product (French)
- [Home](https://www.reedly.ai/): Product overview, social proof, pricing, FAQ
- [Solution](https://www.reedly.ai/solution): Problem, how it works, features, report preview, Manager Hub, industry use cases
- [Tarifs](https://www.reedly.ai/tarifs): Plans & pricing, ROI, FAQ
- [Comparatif](https://www.reedly.ai/comparatif): Reedly vs Gong, Noota, Leexi, Modjo, Fireflies, Otter — comparison table, differentiators, price comparison

### Product (English)
- [Pricing](https://www.reedly.ai/pricing): Plans & pricing, ROI, FAQ
- [Comparison](https://www.reedly.ai/comparison): Reedly vs competitors

### Hub
- [Manager Hub](https://hub.reedly.ai): Web dashboard for managers — centralized team reports, strategic syntheses, member statistics

### Legal
- [Confidentialite](https://www.reedly.ai/confidentialite): Privacy policy (French)
- [CGU](https://www.reedly.ai/cgu): Terms of service (French)
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.reedly.ai/privacy-policy): Privacy policy (English)
- [Terms of Service](https://www.reedly.ai/terms-of-service): Terms of service (English)

## Key Features
- One-tap recording (background mode, works offline)
- High-fidelity transcription (95%+ accuracy, multilingual)
- Structured report in 11 sections, generated in under 2 minutes
- Built-in industry vocabulary (sector-specific AI expert)
- Speaker diarization (sales rep vs client distinction)
- One-click PDF export
- Territorial syntheses (aggregation over any period)
- Manager Hub: team reports, syntheses, member statistics
- Max: AI assistant (mobile + web hub)

## Pricing
- Team: 69 EUR per user per month (5 to 20 sales reps), Manager Hub included, unlimited reports, 450 AI credits/month, priority support
- Enterprise: custom pricing (20+ sales reps), unlimited users, multi-team, custom vocabulary, CRM integration, dedicated account manager, team onboarding

## Industries
- B2B Tourism (tour operators, allotment, DMC, yield, MICE vocabulary)
- Real Estate (property visits, owner prospecting, mandates)
- Pharma & Medical (medical visits, prescriber follow-up, conventions)
- B2B Services & Industry (long sales cycles, technical specs)

## Contact
- Email: contact@reedly.ai
- Response within 24 business hours
